chunks.title: Jeremiah Cast into Cistern
chunks.reason: Narrative of officials accusing Jeremiah and throwing him into the cistern.

chunks.title: Ebed-melech Rescues Jeremiah
chunks.reason: Narrative of the Ethiopian eunuch securing permission and pulling Jeremiah from the mire.

chunks.title: Jeremiah and Zedekiah Consult
chunks.reason: Private conversation where Jeremiah delivers the oracle of surrender to the king.

chunks.title: Jeremiah Hides the Message
chunks.reason: Narrative of Zedekiah's warning to Jeremiah and the prophet's eventual release from the cistern area.
